duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; multimodal2video package uses duration=4 for seedance2.0_vip
ratio_policy: multimodal2video uses explicit 16:9 ratio per current planning contract
final_edit_target: 0.8s-1.6s if a legwork-enhanced section succeeds after generation
baseline_locked_version_policy: V014 is optional enhancement only and cannot replace V013 CUT01 without explicit future human approval.

references.duty: Fenshou identity only. Black/red armored male warrior, face, hair, armor, silhouette, body type, aggressive forward pressure.

Highest-priority Shuangji identity protection only. Female face, female identity, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor collar/shoulders, white-blue robe panels, calm sharp expression. Do not use as action/rhythm/scene/camera reference.
Rainy ancient temple courtyard, frontal main-hall axis, wet stone floor, cinematic environment only. Do not use as character identity reference.

reference_exclusion_policy.excluded_reason: V013 CUT01 is accepted as the baseline, but its frames may reinforce upper-body-only exchange. V014 uses V013 as text baseline only and creates a new hand-foot coordination attempt.

failure_modes_addressed: V013 is strong but mostly upper-body hand/forearm exchange
V014 should add legwork / lower-body attack-defense / hand-foot coordination
Preserve identity success and speed/impact gains from V013
visual_goal: optional SHOT-02 legwork / lower-body attack-defense / hand-foot coordination enhancement while preserving V013 identity and impact gains
action_concept: fast hand exchange escalates into simultaneous upper-body parry/contact and lower-body line stealing, low-kick threat, shin check, knee lift, and ankle/foot sweep threat
rhythm_strategy: hand parry continues while lower body attacks
palm/forearm contact and leg check happen in overlapping rhythm
knee lift to seal the line
short knee bump inside clinch range
ankle / foot sweep threat without large acrobatics
small water splashes from low steps
robe hem flicks with knee lift
sleeve snap, robe snap, hair whip
timing_design: 0.0s-0.60s both fighters exchange fast upper-body contact beats: wrist slap, forearm parry, short palm, compact shoulder pressure; true speed, no slow motion.
0.60s-1.20s one side fails to break through by hand; footwork changes. Fenshou cuts his front foot inside to steal the line while Shuangji steps diagonally outside.
1.20s-1.80s Fenshou threatens a low kick or ankle sweep without acrobatics; Shuangji lifts her knee or turns her shin to seal the line while her hands continue parrying.
1.80s-2.60s upper-body and lower-body actions overlap: palm/forearm contact above, shin check or foot sweep threat below; wet stone splashes sideways from the low steps.
2.60s-4.00s continue fighting, do not pose out. One fighter tries to regain balance and immediately re-enters with hand-foot coordination.
camera_strategy: keep both characters visible from upper body to knees when legwork begins
frontal rainy temple axis remains readable
camera may slightly dip or widen when legwork appears
do not zoom into a beauty portrait
do not turn into a still character poster
negative_constraints: no masculine jaw / heavy male brow / broad male torso for Shuangji
prompt_summary: Chinese prompt with explicit @ reference-duty mapping, exactly two characters, highest-priority Shuangji identity lock, fast hand exchange escalating into legwork and hand-foot coordination, visible upper body to knees when legwork begins, and strict no-frame-contamination / no-final-lock policy.
allowed_next_action: Human package review, then explicit user authorization required for exactly one future canary/preflight/live submit. Do not submit from this package step.
